name: distObjRef
title: distObjRef
description: References a distributed object that is derived from the denoted interface.

parameters.name: Interface
parameters.description: The optionally qualified name of a distributed object interface.

parameters.name: reverse<Interface>
parameters.description: The reverse of a distributed object interface.
